title: `ada' #5709
definition:
1) to pass on, pass away
    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to pass on, pass over
        1a2) to pass away
    1b) (Aphel) to take away, remove, depose
nasbUsage:

    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to pass on, pass over
        1a2) to pass away
    1b) (Aphel) to take away, remove, depose

    NASB:  to pass on or away
